_comment: aiciv-mind hook configuration. Loaded by HooksSettings::from_json_file().
_comment_events: Valid event types: session_start, pre_tool_use, post_tool_use, stop, user_prompt_submit, pre_delegation, post_delegation, memory_write, drive_event
_comment_fields: Each hook: event (required), command (required), args (optional list), tool_names (optional list, tool-use events only), timeout_ms (default 5000), required (default false, if true failure blocks the operation)

hooks._comment: Bash safety gate: blocks dangerous shell commands before execution.
args: INPUT=$(cat); echo "$INPUT" | grep -qiE '"command"\s*:\s*"[^"]*\b(rm\s+-rf\s+/|dd\s+if=|mkfs|:(){ :|:& };:)' && echo '{"type":"pre_tool_use","should_block":true,"reason":"Dangerous command blocked by safety hook"}' || echo '{"type":"pre_tool_use","should_block":false}'

hooks._comment: Session start logger: logs session initialization for diagnostics.
